title: TLGY Acquisition Corp. and StablecoinX Assets Inc. Announce Shareholder Approval of Business Combination

title: Stablecoin startup SquareFi emerges from stealth
snippet: SquareFi, the financial infrastructure for global business payments, today emerged from stealth to enable Fintechs and global platforms to move money faster, launch financial products quickly, and operate across 150+ countries with support for 25+ currencies.
